chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2191 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.02.2026 Mr. Jawad Ahmed Dehraj, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with SIP Latif Thaheem SHO Sakrand (Respondent No.3), and SIP Illahi Bux Dahri PS Sakrand. ----------- The Petitioners are present in Court along with their Counsel. Petitioner No.1 Mst Sajda has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against wishes of her parents/relatives hence being annoyed her brother Ameer Ali (Respondent No.4) has lodged subject F.I.R. on false allegation that she has been abducted by petitioner No.2, who is her husband. Today, I.O. of the case is not attendance. However, SHO PS Sakrand (Respondent No.2) under the Court directions has recorded statement of Petitioner No.1 Ms. Sajda wherein she has reiterated the above facts. The SHO submits that he will hand over the statement of Petitioner No1 recorded by him to the I.O. of the case to submit a report in the light of such statement before the learned Magistrate concerned within seven days. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law. The police officers present today are directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law.

However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law. The police officers present today are directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
